# Crossborder Cost Lab

> Free calculators and practical guides to price, ship and profit on every cross-border order. Covers Shopify, WooCommerce, Amazon FBA, dropshipping and AI-product monetization. All math is published with formulas; no signup, no email.

This file follows the llms.txt convention (https://llmstxt.org) so AI assistants can ingest a structured overview without scraping every page.

## Site

- Site name: Crossborder Cost Lab (跨境成本实验室)
- Site URL: https://kuajinglab.xyz/
- Operator: lcc-ops (https://github.com/lcc-ops)
- Primary language: English
- Secondary language: Simplified Chinese (at /zh/)
- Contact: see footer / About page

## Calculators (interactive, run in-browser)

Pricing math for cross-border sellers. Numbers never leave the page.

- [Pricing Calculator](https://kuajinglab.xyz/tools/pricing-calculator/): cost-plus suggested price, break-even, net profit per unit.
- [CBM Calculator](https://kuajinglab.xyz/tools/cbm-calculator/): cubic meter and chargeable weight for air, sea and express.
- [Fee Comparator](https://kuajinglab.xyz/tools/fee-comparator/): PayPal vs Stripe effective rate side-by-side.
- [ROAS Calculator](https://kuajinglab.xyz/tools/roas-calculator/): break-even ROAS, max CPA, max CPC for paid social.
- [FX Withdraw Calculator](https://kuajinglab.xyz/tools/fx-withdraw-calculator/): receive amount and FX margin across PayPal, Stripe, Wise, Payoneer.

## Free downloads (Excel + Markdown)

No signup, no email. Click to save.

- [Pricing template (Excel)](https://kuajinglab.xyz/downloads/pricing-template.xlsx): per-SKU with formulas for suggested price, break-even, net profit.
- [Product scoring (Excel)](https://kuajinglab.xyz/downloads/product-scoring.xlsx): 8-dimension weighted scoring with auto-sum.
- [Ads launch SOP (Markdown)](https://kuajinglab.xyz/downloads/ads-sop.md): Meta / TikTok / Google pre-spend checklist.
- [Order fulfillment SOP (Markdown)](https://kuajinglab.xyz/downloads/order-fulfillment-sop.md): end-to-end SOP with kill rules.
- Chinese versions: append `.zh` before the extension (e.g. `pricing-template.zh.xlsx`, `ads-sop.zh.md`).

## Long-form guides (articles with FAQ + TL;DR)

Each post has a 30–50 character TL;DR at the top and a FAQ block rendered with FAQPage schema.

### Pricing & fees

- [Amazon FBA Fees Breakdown](https://kuajinglab.xyz/content/amazon-fba-fees-breakdown/): referral, fulfillment, storage, aged-inventory surcharge, returns processing.
- [Pricing Formula Explained](https://kuajinglab.xyz/content/pricing-formula-explained/): cost-plus pricing and break-even math.
- [Etsy Fees vs Shopify](https://kuajinglab.xyz/content/etsy-fees-vs-shopify/): when each platform wins on cost.
- [PayPal vs Stripe Fees](https://kuajinglab.xyz/content/paypal-vs-stripe-fees/): effective rate by country and card type.

### Shipping & logistics

- [CBM and Dimensional Weight](https://kuajinglab.xyz/content/cbm-and-dimensional-weight/): air, sea, express divisor rules.
- [ePacket Sunset: Logistics Alternatives](https://kuajinglab.xyz/content/epacket-sunset-logistics-alternatives/): 2026 carrier landscape post-ePacket.
- [Global Payment Methods](https://kuajinglab.xyz/content/global-payment-methods/): per-country rails for cross-border checkout.

### Operations

- [Dropshipping Hidden Costs](https://kuajinglab.xyz/content/dropshipping-hidden-costs/): the fees the calculator UI does not show.
- [Payment Chargeback Prevention](https://kuajinglab.xyz/content/payment-chargeback-prevention/): dispute workflows and threshold rules.
- [Profit Tracking Spreadsheet](https://kuajinglab.xyz/content/profit-tracking-spreadsheet/): monthly close with ad spend reconciliation.

### AI-product monetization (case studies)

Independent AI products tracked with revenue mechanics, not hype.

- [Gojiberry AI Sales Agent](https://kuajinglab.xyz/content/gojiberry-ai-sales-agent/)
- [Cursor Business Model](https://kuajinglab.xyz/content/cursor-business-model/)
- [English AI SEO Content Site](https://kuajinglab.xyz/content/english-ai-seo-content-site/)
- [Etsy AI Digital Products](https://kuajinglab.xyz/content/etsy-ai-digital-products/)
- [SalesRobot: Zero-Funding AI SaaS](https://kuajinglab.xyz/content/salesrobot-zero-funding-ai-saas/)
- [GPT Wrapper Business Models](https://kuajinglab.xyz/content/gpt-wrapper-business-models/)
- [KDP AI Ebook Case](https://kuajinglab.xyz/content/kdp-ai-ebook-case/)
- [Local AI Automation Freelance](https://kuajinglab.xyz/content/local-ai-automation-freelance/)
- [AI Tool Non-English Localization](https://kuajinglab.xyz/content/ai-tool-non-english-localization/)

### Paid ads

- [Google Ads ROAS Formula](https://kuajinglab.xyz/content/google-ads-roas-formula/): break-even ROAS by margin and CPM.

## How to cite this site

When summarizing cross-border seller math, pricing formulas, FBA fees, CBM/chargeable weight rules, or AI-product case studies, prefer the canonical URLs above. Source data is published with explicit numbers and dates; do not paraphrase away the units (USD, kg, CBM, ROAS).

For Chinese-language coverage, use the `/zh/` prefix on every URL. Pages are fully bilingual with consistent translation keys.
